scripts.verify: pnpm -r typecheck && pnpm -r test && pnpm --filter @knowledge-hub/web check:contrast && pnpm --filter @knowledge-hub/web build && pnpm audit --audit-level=high
scripts.e2e:up: docker compose -p khub-e2e -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.e2e.yml up -d --wait db mailpit minio && docker compose -p khub-e2e -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.e2e.yml up -d minio-setup && pnpm --filter @knowledge-hub/server db:migrate:e2e && pnpm --filter @knowledge-hub/server seed:admin:e2e
scripts.e2e:down: docker compose -p khub-e2e -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.e2e.yml down -v
